message:
chore(bench,test): reformat wonham_gittins benchmarks and add proptest regressions

Reformat bench_with_input closures in wonham_gittins.rs to reduce
unnecessary nesting (rustfmt style). Add proptest regression file for
supervision_properties to preserve a discovered shrunk failure case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 308137aca267e37464cead8b269cd3cf58f15b66b1b03f9a9441d539aee93027 # shrinks to _dummy = 0
